title: The Lakehouse Idea
summary: Why choose between a cheap, flexible data lake and a reliable, structured warehouse? The lakehouse combines both into one governed system for analytics, BI, and AI.

context.headline: Lake plus warehouse, in one
context.description: For years, companies juggled two systems: cheap, flexible data lakes and reliable, structured warehouses. The lakehouse combines them. Data stays in cheap, open cloud storage, but gains stronger reliability and structure on top. Organized through bronze, silver, and gold layers and governed by tools like Unity Catalog, it becomes a shared foundation for many teams.
context.when: From two separate systems to one unified architecture
